race.name: Ugra Ski Marathon
race.tagline: Fifty kilometers of flat freestyle racing on the frozen Gornaya River floodplain in Siberia's oil capital — a Russialoppet event that attracts Olympic and world champions.

climate.description: Late March in Khanty-Mansiysk means deep continental cold with guaranteed snow cover. Temperatures range from -20°C to -2°C. Western Siberia's extreme continental climate provides the most reliable snow conditions of any marathon-distance race. Spring sun begins to warm but temperatures remain well below zero.
challenges: Extreme Siberian cold — can drop well below -20°C
Flat exposed course — wind chill on open floodplain
Remote Siberian location — complex international travel
Geopolitical isolation since 2022 limits international participation

course.primary: A flat 50km freestyle course on the Gornaya River floodplain in Khanty-Mansiysk, the oil-rich Khanty-Mansi Autonomous District. Mostly open terrain with minimal elevation change. The flat profile produces fast times and favors skating technique. The course is designed for both mass participation and elite racing.
course.grooming: High-quality grooming — Khanty-Mansiysk biathlon center infrastructure
features: Flat Siberian floodplain — fast freestyle course
Has attracted Olympic and world champions

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Maximum snow reliability in Siberian continental climate. Strong competitive depth — has attracted Olympic champions. Large field for a Russian event. Geopolitical isolation since 2022 severely limits international draw and accessibility.

history.summary: The Ugra Ski Marathon, founded in 2013 in Khanty-Mansiysk, is a major Russian citizen ski event on the flat Gornaya River floodplain. Set in the oil-rich Khanty-Mansi Autonomous District of Western Siberia, it has attracted Olympic and world champions alongside mass participation. The event was part of the Russialoppet Super Cup and briefly held Euroloppet membership (2015-2017). Since 2022, geopolitical isolation has limited international participation.
notable_facts: Founded in 2013 in Khanty-Mansiysk, Western Siberia
Has attracted Olympic and world champions
Flat course on the Gornaya River floodplain
Khanty-Mansiysk is a major biathlon and Nordic sports center
International participation limited since 2022 due to geopolitical isolation

videos.title: UGRA SKI MARATHON 2017 // Югорский лыжный марафон 2017
videos.description:
Пятый "Югорский лыжный марафон" в Ханты-Мансийске стал битвой двух легендарных имен в современных лыжных гонках - Сергей Устюгов, выступавший на домашней трассе в свой 25-й День рождения, против норвежского двукратного олимпионика Петтера Нортуга! Более 1500 тысяч человек вышли на старт разных дистанций 8 апреля 2017 года на пойме реки Горная. Международный марафонный сезон FIS Worldloppet Cup 2016/2017 завершился в Ханты-Мансийске

5th Ugra Ski Marathon in Khanty-Mansiysk (Russia) was a battle of two big names in modern cross-country - Sergey Ustiugov (RUS) and Petter Northug (NOR). More than 1500 people from 13 countries overcame different distances, including 50 kilometers, in heart of Northern Russia. Enjoy a very interesting final of FIS Worldloppet season 2016/2017!
videos.curation_reason: Comprehensive 2017 race coverage featuring the epic battle between Sergey Ustyugov and Petter Northug, showing course layout and race atmosphere.

videos.title: Югорский лыжный марафон | Ханты-Мансийск
videos.description:
В Ханты-Мансийске прошел 4 ежегодный югорский лыжный марафон от Ханты-Мансийского банка. В нем приняли участие русские и иностранные спортсмены, звезды мирового спорта, а так же любители лыжного спорта на дистанции от 5 до 50 км. Мы покажем как все это было. Подписывайтесь на наш канал: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCuOe... 
Занимайтесь спортом - будьте счастливы!
